title: sphaerolobium calcicola
intro: Sphaerolobium calcicola, also known as the calcicole globeflower, is a flowering plant species in the family Fabaceae. It is a shrub-like plant that has been traditionally used in Australian Indigenous medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may contribute to its potential health benefits, including wound healing and pain relief. Sphaerolobium calcicola can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
